records.question: Which lists with the URL http://mubi.com/lists/sexualities have been updated since 2019-09-23 03:59:09?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT lists.list_id FROM lists
WHERE lists.list_url = 'http://mubi.com/lists/sexualities' AND lists.list_update_timestamp_utc >= '2019-09-23 03:59:09'
records.pred_sql: SELECT list_id FROM lists WHERE list_url = 'http://mubi.com/lists/sexualities' AND list_update_timestamp_utc > '2019-09-23 03:59:09'

records.question: Which lists updated on 2020-02-08 05:51:19 have exactly 12 movies and the URL http://mubi.com/lists/top-jean-claude-brisseau?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT lists.list_id FROM lists

records.question: Which lists created on or before 2019-03-01 00:11:49 have the URL http://mubi.com/lists/films-i-want-to-watch-69f49997-31a2-4358-b647-f00fae10e3f2, have no comments or followers, and belong to users who are not eligible for a trial but do have a payment method?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT lists.list_id FROM lists
JOIN lists_users ON lists.list_id = lists_users.list_id AND lists.user_id = lists_users.user_id
WHERE lists_users.user_eligible_for_trial = '0' AND lists.list_creation_timestamp_utc <= '2019-03-01 00:11:49' AND lists.list_url = 'http://mubi.com/lists/films-i-want-to-watch-69f49997-31a2-4358-b647-f00fae10e3f2' AND lists_users.user_has_payment_method = '1' AND lists.list_comments = 0 AND lists.list_followers <= 0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT lists.list_id
FROM lists
JOIN lists_users ON lists.list_id = lists_users.list_id
WHERE lists.list_creation_timestamp_utc <= '2019-03-01 00:11:49'
  AND lists.list_url = 'http://mubi.com/lists/films-i-want-to-watch-69f49997-31a2-4358-b647-f00fae10e3f2'
  AND lists.list_comments = 0
  AND lists.list_followers = 0
  AND lists_users.user_eligible_for_trial = '0'
  AND lists_users.user_has_payment_method = '1'

records.question: What lists exactly match the URL http://mubi.com/lists/cry-me-an-ocean, were updated on 2019-11-01 21:39:56, created on or before 2019-04-22 19:43:19, have 10 movies, and have at least zero comments and followers?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT lists.list_id FROM lists
WHERE lists.list_comments >= 0 AND lists.list_update_timestamp_utc = '2019-11-01 21:39:56' AND lists.list_creation_timestamp_utc <= '2019-04-22 19:43:19' AND lists.list_url = 'http://mubi.com/lists/cry-me-an-ocean' AND lists.list_followers >= 0 AND lists.list_movie_number = 10
records.pred_sql:
SELECT list_id
FROM lists
WHERE list_url = 'http://mubi.com/lists/cry-me-an-ocean'
  AND list_update_timestamp_utc = '2019-11-01 21:39:56'
  AND list_creation_timestamp_utc <= '2019-04-22 19:43:19'
  AND list_movie_number = 10
  AND list_comments >= 0
  AND list_followers >= 0

records.question: What lists have no comments, belong to users who are not subscribers, were updated on or before 2015-02-18 02:28:38, and have the URL exactly http://mubi.com/lists/2008--76?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT lists.list_id FROM lists
JOIN lists_users ON lists.list_id = lists_users.list_id AND lists.user_id = lists_users.user_id
WHERE lists.list_comments = 0 AND lists_users.user_subscriber = 0 AND lists.list_update_timestamp_utc <= '2015-02-18 02:28:38' AND lists.list_url = 'http://mubi.com/lists/2008--76'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT lists.list_id
FROM lists
JOIN lists_users ON lists.list_id = lists_users.list_id
WHERE lists.list_comments = 0
  AND (lists_users.user_subscriber = 0 OR lists_users.user_subscriber IS NULL)
  AND lists.list_update_timestamp_utc <= '2015-02-18 02:28:38'
  AND lists.list_url = 'http://mubi.com/lists/2008--76'

records.question: Which lists have exactly 8 followers, 34 movies, and 6 comments, use the URL http://mubi.com/lists/films-with-cows, were created on or after 2012-07-02 04:12:30, and updated on or before 2020-04-21 05:55:34?

SELECT list_id
FROM lists
WHERE list_followers = 8
  AND list_movie_number = 34
  AND list_comments = 6
  AND list_url = 'http://mubi.com/lists/films-with-cows'
  AND list_creation_timestamp_utc >= '2012-07-02 04:12:30'
  AND list_update_timestamp_utc <= '2020-04-21 05:55:34'
